platform_info.question: ايه هو staymatch
platform_info.answer: StayMatch هو تطبيق ذكي بيساعد المستخدمين يلاقوا أوض وشقق وسكن مناسب بسهولة حسب الميزانية والتفضيلات والمكان.
platform_info.answer_en: StayMatch is a smart app that helps users find rooms, apartments, and suitable housing easily based on budget, preferences, and location.

platform_info.question: هل التطبيق مجاني
platform_info.answer: أيوة، تقدر تستخدم التطبيق للبحث عن السكن بسهولة.
platform_info.answer_en: Yes, you can use the app to search for housing easily.

platform_info.question: هل التطبيق بيدعم اللغة العربية
platform_info.answer: أيوة، التطبيق بيدعم اللغة العربية والإنجليزية.
platform_info.answer_en: Yes, the app supports both Arabic and English.

platform_info.question: مين يقدر يستخدم التطبيق
platform_info.answer: أي شخص بيدور على أوضة أو شقة أو roommate يقدر يستخدم التطبيق.
platform_info.answer_en: Anyone looking for a room, apartment, or roommate can use the app.

search_help.question: ازاي ابحث عن اوضة
search_help.question_en: How to search for a room
search_help.answer: اكتب المدينة أو المنطقة وحدد السعر أو المواصفات المهمة زي الواي فاي أو الأوضة المفروشة.
search_help.answer_en: Type the city or area and specify the price or important features like WiFi or furnished rooms.

search_help.question: ازاي ابحث عن شقة
search_help.question_en: How to search for an apartment
search_help.answer: تقدر تبحث عن شقق كاملة عن طريق كتابة المدينة والسعر والمواصفات المناسبة ليك.
search_help.answer_en: You can search for full apartments by typing the city, price, and suitable features for you.

search_help.question: هل اقدر احدد السعر
search_help.answer: أيوة، تقدر تحدد أقل وأعلى سعر أو تقول تحت أو فوق مبلغ معين.
search_help.answer_en: Yes, you can specify minimum and maximum price or say under or above a certain amount.

search_help.question: هل اقدر ابحث حسب المدينة
search_help.answer: أيوة، تقدر تحدد المدينة أو المنطقة اللي عاوز تسكن فيها.
search_help.answer_en: Yes, you can specify the city or area where you want to live.

payments.question: ازاي الدفع بيتم
payments.answer: الدفع بيتم حسب الاتفاق بين المستخدم والمالك.
payments.answer_en: Payment is done according to the agreement between the user and the landlord.

payments.question: هل التطبيق مسئول عن الدفع
payments.question_en: Is the app responsible for payment
payments.answer: التطبيق بيوفر منصة للبحث والتواصل فقط، أما الاتفاقات المالية فهي بين المستخدم والمالك.
payments.answer_en: The app provides a platform for search and communication only, financial agreements are between the user and landlord.

payments.question: ازاي اتجنب النصب
payments.answer: يفضل عدم تحويل أي مبالغ قبل التأكد من السكن ومراجعة التفاصيل.
payments.answer_en: It's better not to transfer any money before verifying the housing and reviewing the details.

safety_and_rights.question: هل بياناتي آمنة
safety_and_rights.answer: StayMatch يهتم بحماية بيانات المستخدمين وتأمين المعلومات الشخصية.
safety_and_rights.answer_en: StayMatch cares about protecting user data and securing personal information.

safety_and_rights.question: هل اقدر اعمل بلاغ
safety_and_rights.answer: أيوة، تقدر تعمل بلاغ في حالة وجود إعلان مضلل أو مشكلة.
safety_and_rights.answer_en: Yes, you can report if there's a misleading listing or problem.

housing_features.question: هل فيه اماكن مفروشة
housing_features.answer: أيوة، تقدر تبحث عن أماكن مفروشة.
housing_features.answer_en: Yes, you can search for furnished places.

housing_features.question: هل فيه واي فاي
housing_features.answer: أيوة، تقدر تبحث عن أماكن فيها WiFi.
housing_features.answer_en: Yes, you can search for places with WiFi.

support.question: ازاي اتواصل مع الدعم
support.answer: تقدر تتواصل مع الدعم من خلال التطبيق.
support.answer_en: You can contact support through the app.

hosting.question: How do I add a property
hosting.question_en: How do I add a property
hosting.answer: You can add a property by selecting 'Add Property' and choosing between listing a whole apartment or individual rooms in a shared apartment. This allows you to become a host and list your property for rent.
hosting.answer_en: You can add a property by selecting 'Add Property' and choosing between listing a whole apartment or individual rooms in a shared apartment. This allows you to become a host and list your property for rent.

hosting.question: What information do I need to provide for my property
hosting.question_en: What information do I need to provide for my property
hosting.answer: You need to provide property name, address, rental price, description, available amenities, rental availability, and property images. This information helps potential tenants evaluate your property before booking.
hosting.answer_en: You need to provide property name, address, rental price, description, available amenities, rental availability, and property images. This information helps potential tenants evaluate your property before booking.

hosting.question: How do I add rooms in a shared apartment
hosting.question_en: How do I add rooms in a shared apartment
hosting.answer: If you choose to list individual rooms, each room is added separately. For every room, specify room type, capacity, price, furniture, availability, and room images. The apartment information is shared across all rooms to avoid duplication.
hosting.answer_en: If you choose to list individual rooms, each room is added separately. For every room, specify room type, capacity, price, furniture, availability, and room images. The apartment information is shared across all rooms to avoid duplication.

hosting.question: How do I find an apartment
hosting.question_en: When will my property be published
hosting.answer: After submitting your property, it is not published immediately. It is sent to the administrator for review. Only approved listings become visible to other users, ensuring platform quality and preventing fake listings.
hosting.answer_en: After submitting your property, it is not published immediately. It is sent to the administrator for review. Only approved listings become visible to other users, ensuring platform quality and preventing fake listings.

booking.question: How do I find an apartment
booking.question_en: How do I find an apartment
booking.answer: Start by selecting 'Discover Apartments' from the Home page. You can use intelligent filters to search for apartments based on location, move-in date, and number of people who will live there.
booking.answer_en: Start by selecting 'Discover Apartments' from the Home page. You can use intelligent filters to search for apartments based on location, move-in date, and number of people who will live there.

booking.question: What filters can I use to search for apartments
booking.question_en: What filters can I use to search for apartments
booking.answer: You can filter by location/city, move-in date or rental period, and number of people (individuals, couples, families, or groups). These filters help the system recommend apartments that best match your needs.
booking.answer_en: You can filter by location/city, move-in date or rental period, and number of people (individuals, couples, families, or groups). These filters help the system recommend apartments that best match your needs.

booking.question: What information is shown on apartment details
booking.question_en: What information is shown on apartment details
booking.answer: The Apartment Details page shows apartment images, description, amenities, nearby services, location, and price. You can also access the Host Profile from this page to evaluate the property owner.
booking.answer_en: The Apartment Details page shows apartment images, description, amenities, nearby services, location, and price. You can also access the Host Profile from this page to evaluate the property owner.

booking.question: What information is shown on host profile
booking.question_en: What information is shown on host profile
booking.answer: The Host Profile displays verification status, reviews, ratings, listed apartments, and listed rooms. This helps you evaluate the property owner before booking.
booking.answer_en: The Host Profile displays verification status, reviews, ratings, listed apartments, and listed rooms. This helps you evaluate the property owner before booking.

booking.question: How do I submit a booking request
booking.question_en: How do I submit a booking request
booking.answer: If the apartment matches your requirements, you can submit a booking request. You may include an optional message to the host. The host will then decide to accept or reject the booking through the Booking Request page.
booking.answer_en: If the apartment matches your requirements, you can submit a booking request. You may include an optional message to the host. The host will then decide to accept or reject the booking through the Booking Request page.

booking.question: How can I track my booking status
booking.question_en: How can I track my booking status
booking.answer: You receive a notification when the host responds to your booking request. You can also check the My Booking page to see the status of your booking requests: Approved, Pending, Rejected, Completed, or Canceled.
booking.answer_en: You receive a notification when the host responds to your booking request. You can also check the My Booking page to see the status of your booking requests: Approved, Pending, Rejected, Completed, or Canceled.
